description_long: This kiosk features a striking geometric design with illuminated patterns in cyan, red, and gold, giving it a futuristic and high-tech appearance. The structure is composed of a main rectangular body with metallic gold and dark gray panels, adorned with triangular and diamond-shaped motifs. The front section includes a recessed area supported by four columns, with glowing floor panels and a layered, square canopy above. One side displays a large circular element with a spiral pattern and intricate markings, possibly serving as a decorative or interactive feature. The roof is flat and gold, punctuated by glowing geometric cutouts, while the rear and side panels are decorated with additional illuminated symbols. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal, glass, and illuminated acrylic or plastic, with a robust and visually engaging presence suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic kiosk with gold and dark gray panels, glowing geometric patterns, and a layered canopy supported by columns. Features illuminated symbols, a spiral motif, and a flat roof with cutouts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed entry area with columns, glowing floor panels, and the layered canopy, as well as the intricate spiral motif on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the gold and gray panels with illuminated diamond and triangle motifs, and the solid, boxy structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view reveals the large circular spiral feature and more geometric patterns, emphasizing the kiosk's decorative elements.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the flat gold roof with glowing cutouts and the back panel with additional illuminated symbols, showing the kiosk's depth.
attribute_signage_type: illuminated sign integrated into structure, featuring geometric symbols and patterns on front and side panels; no visible text
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with gold finish, geometric cutouts, and illuminated decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: futuristic with geometric and high-tech influences
